description_short: Blueprint authoring and testing tools: update, recycle, undo, stats, Markdown, throughput, cleanup, layout, height filters, and instant build.
description_long: Blueprint Designer's Toolkit (BDT) Blueprint authoring and testing tools for Captain of Industry designers. - Update blueprint: replace an existing blueprint from a new area selection while preserving name, description, overlap settings, and book position. - Recycle Bin: copy deleted or updated blueprints/folders into a configurable recycle bin folder to prevent accidental permanent loss. - Undo placement: undo recent blueprint placement and copy/paste actions with Ctrl+Z. - Remembered folder: reopen the blueprint book where you left it. - Operational stats: show workers, electricity, computing, and maintenance in the blueprint detail panel. - Copy as Markdown: copy single-blueprint summaries or recursive folder tables to the clipboard for Hub posts and documentation. - Symmetric normalization: normalize functionally identical balancer/connector orientations in captured blueprints to improve paste-over behavior. - Instant build and cleanup: sandbox-friendly instant construction/deconstruction plus area cleanup for disconnected transports. - Height and layout visualization: filter layered logistics by height and render building layout boxes for clearance planning. - Throughput tools: monitor flow, show throughput overlays/heat maps, bulk-configure areas, and sandbox-test custom capacity limits. Pollution heat map/overlay is work in progress. Designer-only, consumer-free: blueprints remain vanilla-compatible and players using your blueprints do not need this mod installed.
